attributes.action: Petition to Reform UK Property Purchase Laws
attributes.background: We call upon the UK Government and Parliament to reform residential property transaction laws across the United Kingdom to introduce earlier legally binding commitments between buyers and sellers during the home-buying process.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for the same action:

Make accepted property offers binding and require compensation if withdrawn 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767569

You may also wish to sign the following related petition:

Sellers who take house off the market to be liable to repay expenses of buyer
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758654
